current: knowledgebase/cloudflare/worker owns the fleet RAG API; Linkchat and Starboard shared-RAG paths use it, SaaS Maker has no active in-API RAG/knowledge backend, and retired FastAPI route aliases forward to the Cloudflare Worker handlers with a Node-only audit gate

current: The current cloudflare/worker code is deployed to https://knowledgebase.sarthakagrawal927.workers.dev (version 418b60d7-5901-40e1-8948-a92d56cab351). Public health/ready/metrics aliases return 200, protected retired FastAPI aliases reject anonymous callers with 401, and smoke:legacy-routes --require-complete confirms the deploy_fingerprint knowledgebase-cloudflare-full-port-2026-06-21. readiness:full-port passed deployed-legacy-route-parity, deployed-worker-fingerprint, and authenticated checks on the same Worker version.

current: The deployed Worker path, Worker full-port/preflight gates, testing UI, migration tooling, and local checks are TypeScript/Node-only; the old Python FastAPI server, Python UI, Docker Compose runtime, Python package metadata, parser/query/eval code, and root pytest suite have been retired and are covered by audit:python-runtime-retirement plus preflight

current: Worker has TypeScript schema inference, schema drafts/apply/discard/active/reprocess, direct JSON/text ingestion, uploaded structured-file ingestion, entity/relationship extraction, relationship backfill, structured D1 query routes, parse evals, direct local MinIO inline xl.meta eval cases, and --min-pass-rate parity gates

current: Worker parses common text/JSON/CSV/HTML/PDF/XLSX/DOCX/PPTX inputs, uses Markdown Conversion fallback, and has opt-in Workers AI image OCR for standalone image uploads, scanned fixtures, and weak-text PDFs; PDF vision OCR prioritizes page-like images over tiny embedded assets; Llama 3.2 Vision tries prompt+image bytes first with image_url fallback, while Llama 4 Scout uses image_url messages. The deployed scanned-PDF OCR gate (readiness:full-port nvda-scanned-ocr-live) passed live against the Cloudflare vision model chain with pass_rate 1 on the NVDA scanned PDF fixture.
cloudflare_target: Rust/WASM parsers, Workers AI vision/OCR where useful, and R2-backed artifacts
gap: Live scanned-PDF OCR parity proven on the deployed Worker. Re-run readiness:full-port with RAG_ALLOW_LIVE_OCR=1 whenever the vision model chain or parser fallback changes.
